definition: Most high earners never learn to deploy capital effectively; wealth without spending skill fails to compound.
rationale: Coherent concept with tight definition; min intra-similarity 0.898 supports cohesion.

splits.definition: Document the struggle and comeback, not just the destination; narrative visibility of progress.
Set up tracking before it's harder; tracking mandatory for improvement—without it, no feedback signal exists.

definition: Documentation of progress and metrics drive improvement; track struggle, not just success.
rationale: Members split into narrative documentation (visibility) vs. measurement systems (feedback loops); different loads.

splits.definition: Compose AI-driven workflows by integrating APIs and cloud automation (Composio, Trigger.dev).
Portable Claude skills enable efficient automation on drives platform; automation reduces manual overhead.

definition: AI automation integrations (Composio, Trigger.dev) and Claude Skills platform enable scalable service delivery.
rationale: Cluster conflates three concepts: API integration, platform-level skills, and configuration mechanics. Kick setup detail; split integration from platform.

definition: Members conflate timing decisions with temporal delay; no coherent load-bearing concept.
rationale: Only 2/6 members address duration/delay; others cover timing strategy, decision windows, regulation phase-in. Centroid pulls in misaligned members. Kick cluster.

definition: Maintain founder voting control while raising capital through structured equity and operator partnerships.
rationale: Members focus on equity structuring and control maintenance, not fundraising process; rename for clarity.

definition: Define the specific input action that drives results, then multiply it via leverage while keeping founder effort constant or reduced.
rationale: Coherent concept across all members; min intra-similarity 0.910 supports tight clustering.

definition: Brand is the most cost-effective long-term competitive moat; creates pricing power, customer loyalty, and talent attraction.
rationale: Clean concept; members cohesively support brand as primary defense against commoditization.

definition: Think two steps ahead—what happens after your action, then what happens after their reaction—to avoid reactive decisions.
rationale: Concept is specifically about decision-making via consequence modeling, not generic consequence mapping.

splits.definition: Top salespeople cost $100-200k/year; real estate agents earn 4-5% on massive deal values ($800k-$1M) with zero capital.
Boost affiliate commission 5-10x when LTV/margins justify it; recruiting pays 20% of annual salary; align sales commission to pricing strategy.

definition: Talent compensation structure and ROI; align incentives to business economics.
rationale: Members split into compensation benchmarks vs. incentive structure; different decision contexts.

definition: Model high performers by observing inputs/outputs, not asking why; automatic behaviors don't reveal true causation.
rationale: Cohesive concept; min intra-similarity 0.891 supports tight focus on observational learning.

definition: Shift from top-line growth to bottom-line expansion; unit economics quality and absolute profit matter more than volume.
rationale: Concept specifically emphasizes unit economics and margin focus over revenue growth; rename for accuracy.

definition: Churn drops dramatically with tenure; measure trial and paid cohorts separately; focus on day-90 and month-6 milestones.
rationale: Clear concept about measurement separation and time-based analysis; min intra-similarity 0.878 supports cohesion.

definition: For recurring services, combine deep first-month discount with setup fee, then charge full price recurring; reduces churn via commitment.
rationale: Cohesive framework across all members; min intra-similarity 0.901 supports tight clustering.

definition: Take one winning image and generate 20-30 variations via filters, AI, and remakes to extend reach across platforms.
rationale: Specific, load-bearing tactic; members support single coherent concept.

definition: Wait minimum 1 month to calculate true LTV-to-CAC; spend 2x target CAC to gather sufficient feedback cadence before pivoting.
rationale: Concept is about time window for valid measurement, not validation logic; rename for precision.
